    Game
     
    Game.PlayerMetadata
     
    GameEndEvent
    Called after a TNTRun game finishes and enters the ending phase.
    GameEvent
    Base class for all events related to an active TNTRun game instance.
    GameEvents
     
    GameItemEvents
     
    GameManager
     
    GameSound
     
    GameStartEvent
    Called after a TNTRun game enters active play.
    GameState
     
    GameStateChangeEvent
    Called immediately before a TNTRun game changes state.
    GameStateHandler
     
    GameStopEvent
    Called after a TNTRun game has been forcefully stopped and cleaned up.

    PlaceholderManager
    PlaceholderAPI expansion for TNT Run placeholders.
    PlacementMessenger
     
    PlayerAmountsPage
     
    PlayerCommands
     
    PlayerDoubleJumpEvent
    Called before a player consumes and performs a double jump.
    PlayerEliminateEvent
    Called after a player is eliminated from an active TNTRun game.
    PlayerEvent
    Base class for TNTRun events associated with a single Bukkit player.
    PlayerJoinAttemptEvent
    Fired when a player attempts to join a TNTRun game.
    PlayerLeaveGameEvent
    Called immediately before a player is removed from an active TNTRun game.
    PlayerLeaveGameEvent.LeaveReason
    Represents the cause of a player leaving the game.
    PlayerSettingsPage
     
    PlayerStatisticChangeEvent<T>
    Called before a player's statistic value is stored.
